name: serpico
description: Peter Maas's true story of Frank Serpico, the NYPD detective who took on systemic police corruption alone — integrity, betrayal, the blue wall of silence, and the Knapp Commission.
useCase: Learn how one whistleblower exposed NYPD corruption, the blue wall of silence, and the personal cost of integrity. Lessons for anyone facing ethical choices in a corrupt system.
knownRisks: Contains graphic violence and police corruption
May be triggering for those who have experienced institutional betrayal
